description_long: This is a modern American-style police car, modeled after a full-sized sedan with a robust, boxy build. The vehicle is predominantly white with bold blue stripes running along the sides, and the word 'POLICE' is prominently displayed on the hood and doors. The car features a roof-mounted light bar with red, blue, and white emergency lights, as well as additional lights on the front grille. The side doors display the text 'SANDCREST COUNTY POLICE' and 'SPEED ENFORCEMENT' in white and blue, with a small badge graphic. The wheels are black with simple hubcaps, and the windows are tinted dark. The rear of the car includes a visible license plate and more police markings, making it easily identifiable as a law enforcement vehicle.
description: A white and blue American police sedan with bold police markings, roof-mounted emergency lights, and prominent law enforcement text and graphics.
description_view_0: Side view showing 'SANDCREST COUNTY POLICE' and 'SPEED ENFORCEMENT' text, blue stripe, and roof light bar.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the 'POLICE' text on the hood, grille guard, and roof-mounted emergency lights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar police markings and blue stripe, showing the car's full length and light bar.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the license plate, rear emergency lights, and 'SPEED ENFORCEMENT' text on the trunk.
attribute_police_markings: The vehicle features 'POLICE' in large white letters on the hood and both side doors, 'SANDCREST COUNTY POLICE' in white and blue on the side doors, and 'SPEED ENFORCEMENT' in white on the rear quarter panels and trunk. Blue stripes run along the sides, and there is a small badge graphic on the front doors.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with red, blue, and white lights is present, along with additional colored lights on the front grille and rear deck. The lights are rectangular and arranged in a linear fashion.
attribute_police_insignia: A small badge or shield graphic is visible on the front doors, colored in blue and white.
attribute_license_plate: A license plate is visible on the rear of the vehicle, mounted centrally on the trunk. It is white with dark text, but the specific text is not legible.
